title: In the Aftermath
overview: In a radiation-soaked wasteland, two surviving soldiers, Frank and Goose, search for essential supplies amid the rubble.  After a violent confrontation, Frank is haunted by visions of an angelic young girl holding a giant egg, herself a refugee from another world altogether.  Could the egg be the key to saving both their world?
